notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the libtiff SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2022-48281, CVE-2023-0800, CVE-2023-0801, CVE-2023-0802, CVE-2023-0803, and 1 more.
